name: science-superpowers
description: An agentic skills framework & computational-science methodology that works: research framing, pre-registration, reproducible analysis, anomaly investigation, and red-team review.

interface.shortDescription: Framing, pre-registration, reproducible analysis, and review workflows for research agents
interface.longDescription: Use Science Superpowers to guide agent work through research framing, prior-work survey, analysis design, pre-registration, reproducible execution, anomaly investigation, results verification, red-team review, and reporting workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got a research question I'd like to investigate.
